rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port assumptions/guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE content, with type scopes for constants and equations, implementation scopes for assignments.
generic_rules: Ensure all AGREE variables are grounded in visible AADL features or explicit declarations.
Use only valid AADL feature names and types in AGREE expressions; avoid AADL property names as variables.
Place implementation-level bindings in implementation scopes after relevant subcomponents and connections.
Validate that guarantees reference only visible features at the component type level.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE contracts must be enclosed in `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type annexes are for assumptions, guarantees, constants, and equations; implementation annexes for assignments.
anti_patterns: Do not place implementation-level guarantees in component type annexes; move valid bindings to implementation scope.
Do not reference subcomponent ports or non-visible identifiers in type-level contracts.
irrelevant_topics: AADL property names as AGREE variables
AGREE validator diagnostics and repair actions
Model Analyst agent's structural extraction tasks
